name: Reinforteach
description: Converts operator feedback on agent turns into DPO training signal for local models

enabled.description: Enable feedback capture and candidate pipeline

feedbackWindowTurns.description: Number of turns to search back when attributing feedback to an agent turn

confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum |sentiment × magnitude| to pass a candidate to the buffer

modelPath.description: Path to the .gguf model file being trained

oracleSubagent.description: Agent ID of the oracle subagent used to generate chosen completions
